overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character navigating the urban streets of Los Santos. The character crosses multiple intersections, passes commercial buildings including an Ammu-Nation store, and navigates around city traffic including a red transit bus. The footage features typical GTA V third-person perspective with smooth camera following through a detailed urban environment.

low-rise commercial building with curved facade and green trim

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a busy Los Santos intersection with a tall glass skyscraper visible in the distance. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk while a red transit bus and sports car pass by. The scene ends abruptly as the character is struck by a vehicle and falls.

segments.scene_description: After recovering from the fall, the character walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and commercial buildings. A purple billboard is visible on the left as the character moves away from the intersection into a more enclosed street corridor.

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a multi-story parking garage with an abandoned car parked nearby. In the distance, a tall damaged building looms over the street as the character approaches and crosses another intersection.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial block dominated by the Ammu-Nation gun store with its distinctive yellow signage. A construction crane is visible in the distance, and pedestrians walk on the opposite side of the street. The character stops at the corner near a yellow fire hydrant to wait for traffic.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the intersection as a red transit bus pulls up to the stop. Walking along the sidewalk, the character passes a blue mailbox and bus bench while a green recycling truck drives by. The segment shows moderate pedestrian activity near the bus stop area with the character continuing down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling urban corridor of Los Santos, transitioning from a chaotic main intersection into a dense commercial district. It begins as the character crosses a busy asphalt intersection beneath a distant glass skyscraper, momentarily falling after being struck by a passing vehicle. As the character recovers and moves away from the intersection, the scene shifts to a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and a purple billboard before passing a multi-story parking garage and a looming damaged building. The camera then follows the character along a commercial block dominated by the yellow signage of an Ammu-Nation store and a distant construction crane, eventually pausing at a yellow fire hydrant. Finally, the movement continues across another intersection as a red transit bus pulls over, passing a blue mailbox and a green recycling truck amidst moderate pedestrian activity.
